page.primary_keyword: Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental
page.title: Puerto Banus Stag Weekend: Ultimate Yacht Rental Guide

data.meta_description: Plan the ultimate Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental with our guide. Prices from €749/2h on Astondoa 40. Book now for an unforgettable party on the water.
data.summary: This guide covers everything you need to know about Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental, including boat options, pricing from €749/2h, and top tips for a legendary party on the Mediterranean. Plan your trip with our fleet of luxury yachts departing from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Prices start at €749/2h for Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) from €4,719/4h with free jet ski.
Maximum capacity ranges from 5 to 12 pax depending on boat.
All departures from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Book via WhatsApp for non-standard boats; no hidden fees.

faq.q: What is the best boat for a stag weekend in Puerto Banus?
faq.a: For a stag group of up to 11, the Azimut 39 (€749/2h) offers a spacious flybridge and cool interior. For bigger parties up to 12, the Mangusta 80 (from €4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski for extra fun. Both depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: How much does a yacht rental cost for a stag weekend in Puerto Banus?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80 require a minimum 4-hour booking at €4,719. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% IVA.

faq.q: What is included in a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Each charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT. You just bring your stag party and your own music.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring extra food and drinks. Our standard package already includes beer, wine, cava, soft drinks, and snacks. If you want a catered menu, let us know when booking via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How many people can join a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Capacity varies by boat: the Astondoa 40 takes up to 9 passengers, Azimut 39 up to 11, and Mangusta 80 up to 12. Smaller speedboats like the Mariah SX21 take 5. Check our fleet page for exact limits.

faq.q: Where do the yachts depart from?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús marina, the heart of Marbella's nightlife and luxury scene. It's easy to reach from the Golden Mile or Marbella town centre. We'll confirm the exact berth upon booking.

faq.q: Can we add a jet ski to our stag charter?
faq.a: Yes, Tier B charters on the Mangusta 80 (including white and grey variants) include a free jet ski. For other boats, you can add a jet ski for an extra fee – just ask via WhatsApp when booking.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for a stag weekend?
faq.a: For Tier A and B boats, you can book directly through our website. For other boats like the Ferretti 94 or Pershing 46, pricing is on request – contact us via WhatsApp for availability and custom packages.

data.body_html:
Planning a Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental is the ultimate way to celebrate before the big day. With the Mediterranean sun, luxury yachts, and world-class nightlife on your doorstep, Marbella's Puerto Banús is the perfect party base. Whether you want a fast 2-hour blast or a full-day cruise with jet ski action, our fleet has the right boat for your group. Prices start from just €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40, and all charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks – so you can focus on the fun.

Why Choose a Yacht for Your Stag Weekend?

A yacht charter turns a stag weekend into a floating VIP party. You get private space for your group, epic photo opportunities with the Marbella coastline, and the freedom to anchor at secluded coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. No crowded bars, no queues – just you, your mates, and the sea. Plus, you can tailor the itinerary: hit the open water, stop for a swim, or cruise past the mega-yachts in Puerto Banús harbour.

Our Fleet for Stag Groups

We offer a range of boats suited to different group sizes and budgets. Here's a quick overview of the most popular choices for stag parties:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax, Tier A) – €749/2h, €2,299/8h. Perfect for smaller groups wanting a premium experience.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax, Tier A) – same pricing, more capacity. Flybridge for sunbathing.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax, Tier B) – from €4,719/4h, includes a free jet ski. The ultimate party yacht.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – pricing on request. Luxurious with ample deck space.
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) – for a more adrenaline-fuelled option. Contact us for rates.

For full details, see our boat rental in Marbella page.

Pricing and What's Included

All our charters are all-inclusive, so there are no surprise costs. Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%).

Boat TierExample BoatsPrice (2h)Price (8h)Min Booking
Tier AAstondoa 40, Azimut 39€749€2,2992 hours
Tier BMangusta 80 (all variants)––4 hours (€4,719)
OtherFerretti 94, Pershing 46, etc.Pricing on request via WhatsApp–

For Tier B, the 4-hour minimum includes a free jet ski – a massive hit with stag groups.

Top Stag Itinerary: Puerto Banús to Cabopino

A classic route for a stag party is to cruise from Puerto Banús east towards Cabopino. You'll pass the Golden Mile and Marbella Marina, then anchor near the dunes for swimming and jet ski action. The return trip offers sunset views over La Concha mountain. Total sailing time is around 30 minutes each way, leaving plenty of time for partying. If you want to go further, Estepona and Sotogrande are also reachable on longer charters.

What to Bring for Your Stag Yacht Charter

  • Swimwear and towels – we don't provide these.
  • Sun protection (SPF 50+, hats, sunglasses).
  • Your own music playlist – most boats have Bluetooth speakers.
  • Extra snacks or food if you want more than our light bites.
  • Cash or card for any additional purchases (e.g., extra jet ski time).

Remember, the skipper is there for your safety – they'll also help with anchoring and any questions.

Booking Tips for a Stag Weekend

Book early – summer weekends in Puerto Banús fill up fast. For groups of 10+, consider the Mangusta 80 for its space and jet ski. If your budget is tighter, two Tier A boats can be chartered side-by-side. Always confirm the exact passenger count when booking, as capacity limits are strict for insurance reasons. Use WhatsApp for quick questions on availability.

Check out our Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental guide for more inspiration.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best boat for a stag weekend in Puerto Banus?

For a stag group of up to 11, the Azimut 39 (€749/2h) offers a spacious flybridge and cool interior. For bigger parties up to 12, the Mangusta 80 (from €4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski for extra fun. Both depart from Puerto Banús.

How much does a yacht rental cost for a stag weekend in Puerto Banus?

Our Tier A boats start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80 require a minimum 4-hour booking at €4,719. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% IVA.

What is included in a stag yacht charter?

Each charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT. You just bring your stag party and your own music.

Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring extra food and drinks. Our standard package already includes beer, wine, cava, soft drinks, and snacks. If you want a catered menu, let us know when booking via WhatsApp.

How many people can join a stag yacht charter?

Capacity varies by boat: the Astondoa 40 takes up to 9 passengers, Azimut 39 up to 11, and Mangusta 80 up to 12. Smaller speedboats like the Mariah SX21 take 5. Check our fleet page for exact limits.

Where do the yachts depart from?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús marina, the heart of Marbella's nightlife and luxury scene. It's easy to reach from the Golden Mile or Marbella town centre. We'll confirm the exact berth upon booking.

Can we add a jet ski to our stag charter?

Yes, Tier B charters on the Mangusta 80 (including white and grey variants) include a free jet ski. For other boats, you can add a jet ski for an extra fee – just ask via WhatsApp when booking.

How do I book a yacht for a stag weekend?

For Tier A and B boats, you can book directly through our website. For other boats like the Ferretti 94 or Pershing 46, pricing is on request – contact us via WhatsApp for availability and custom packages.

Ready to plan your Puerto Banus stag weekend yacht rental? Browse our full fleet and book online, or message us on WhatsApp for a personalised quote. Cheers to the groom!
